name: herald-piper
description: HERALD Piper - browser publisher agent (Fargate, Playwright). Reads an approved/scheduled herald_content_queue item, injects the per-user session (SPEC-C, memory-only, KMS-gated) into a browser context, enforces SPEC-D platform-safety caps via reserve-then-act, and publishes (DRY-RUN by default -> nowhere real). One agent = one service (SEC-3). Envelope/contract per SPEC-B; pipeline per SPEC-H.
